# kSecKeyEndDate

**Global Variable**

Type `CSSM_DATE`.  Latest date at which this key may be used.  If the value is all zeros or not present, no restriction applies.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecKeyEndDate: Int32 { get }
```
title: kSecKeyEndDate
